task_objective: Implement review plans for RPC result typing, Decky logging import overhead, shortcut artwork parallelization, and _run_blocking polling removal.
tests_added: tests/test_frontend_static.py RPC status typing and guard assertions
design_decisions: Represent backend _call status dictionaries as RpcResult<T> in the frontend.
Guard refresh and version payloads before reading successful payload fields.
Resolve decky.logger once at service module import time and reuse the cached logger reference.
Signal _run_blocking completion through loop.call_soon_threadsafe and an asyncio Future.
Apply independent shortcut artwork assets concurrently with Promise.all.
results: Targeted red tests failed before implementation and passed after implementation; full validation was run through ./run.sh.
